notes: Mobile projection sheet: fix value cells not showing. Root cause: in v29 I accidentally closed the @media (max-width: 768px) block too early in the CSS, leaving mobile-only rules (bottom nav, syncBar, etc.) applied at all viewports — and the mobile column-hide rule structure was tangled. v30 restructures CSS so the entire mobile block is contiguous and properly closed. Also removed the @media wrapper around the dynamic reveal style tag so it applies regardless of viewport (display: table-cell !important is a no-op when no hide rule applies).
